name: Mining Global Inc.
summary: Mining Global Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It explores for gold, silver, copper, zinc, lead, uranium, and rare earth minerals. The company primarily holds a 100% interest in the Blue Jack property consisting of 10 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 206 acres located in Humboldt County, Nevada; and the Minnie Claim property that covers an area of 20 acres located in the Leecher Creek Mining Division, Washington State. It also focuses on the acquisition and production of oil and gas properties in and around the State of Texas' Permian Basin and the Bend Arch-Fort Worth Basin. The company was formerly known as Yaterra Ventures Corp. and changed its name to Mining Global Inc. in August 2014. Mining Global Inc. was founded in 2006 and is based in Wickenburg, Arizona.
